name: Shibaura Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shibaura Electronics Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells thermistor elements, and products utilizing thermistor elements in Japan and internationally. The company offers temperature sensors, humidity sensors, temperature controllers, anemometers, etc. Its products are used in automobiles, air conditioners, home appliances, housing equipment, industrial equipment, and printers. Shibaura Electronics Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.
